name: Blackberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Follow directions in recipe or on box for one 2-crust pie.
3. Line bottom and sides of one 9-inch pie pan with pie dough.
4. Set pan and remaining dough aside.
5. In a mixing bowl, place blackberries, sugar, lemon juice, lemon rind, flour, and salt. Mix thoroughly.
6. Pour mixture into pie shell.
7. Dot with margarine.
8. On a well-floured board, roll remaining dough to a 10-inch diameter.
9. Slice into long 1/2-inch strips and place strips across top of pie in a criss-cross pattern.
10. Pinch edges down around pie.
11. Sprinkle top with sugar.
12. Place on a jelly roll pan.
13. Bake in a 450 degree oven for 10 minutes.
14. Reduce heat to 350 degrees.
15. Bake for 50-60 more minutes until pie crust is golden brown.
16. Let cool.
